=== palette (顶层语义色，token 源) ===

bg=#FFFFFFFF surface=#F0F0F0FF border=#C8C8C8FF text=#1E1E1EFF textDim=#646464FF textHint=#969696FF accent=#0078D4FF onAccent=#FFFFFFFF shadow=#0000000F
